description: What equipment is affected if Chiller-6 fails? Trace the full downstream dependency chain.
Primary Cooling Water Pump PMP-101 is scheduled for replacement. Identify all equipment within 3 hops that will lose cooling capacity.
Boiler BLR-02 has a tube leak. Which downstream heat exchangers, AHUs, and terminal units are affected?
The Building Management System (BMS) controller for Zone-3 is offline. Trace which sensors, equipment, and active work orders are impacted.
Motor MTR-44 drives Compressor CMP-12 which feeds Chiller CH-03. If the motor bearing fails, what is the full failure cascade?
Electrical switchgear SWG-01 provides power to 14 downstream assets. List the transitive closure of all equipment that loses power if SWG-01 trips.
Cooling tower CT-02 basin is fouled. Which condenser water loops, chillers, and AHUs are within the dependency subgraph?
Compare the blast radius of failing Pump PMP-201 versus Pump PMP-202. Which has a larger downstream impact?
